what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG icon of an isometric cube outline using currentColor stroke styling.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no fill.
Stroke color is inherited via currentColor.
The cube is drawn with two path elements: an outer hexagonal cube outline and internal edge lines.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
standouts: Geometry is expressed directly in path data.
The icon is themeable through inherited text color.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions: no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded caps and joins.
Uses a 24 by 24 coordinate system typical for UI icon sets.
Keeps styling attributes on the root svg element.
notes: A small reusable outline icon representing an isometric cube.
questions: Should this icon include accessibility metadata such as a title when used directly?
Is stroke width 1.5 the intended standard for this icon set?
purpose_vs_actual: The path/name suggests an isometric cube icon, and the SVG content draws that form.
intention_signals: It appears intended to supply a reusable cube icon that adapts to surrounding color and fits a consistent outline icon system.
contribution: Provides a compact, themeable SVG cube symbol with explicit outline geometry suitable for reuse in icon-driven UI surfaces.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon depicting an isometric cube with rounded stroke styling.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing a cube or modular object concept as a reusable design-system icon.
